description: All variables, function parameters, and return values must have explicit type annotations.
All variables must be declared at the top of a function or module.
Inline variable declarations within expressions are not allowed.
All constants must be declared collectively at the top of the file.
Class members must be ordered as public → protected → private.
Type inference keywords like 'var' or 'auto' are disallowed.
The code convention of using descriptive and explicit naming for variables and functions
